text:
ANTCGLNT_ADMSN_CD ANTCGLNT_ADMSN_CD Other: IV - Anticoagulation (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving IV anticoagulations. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
604 ANTCGLNT_DSCHRG_CD ANTCGLNT_DSCHRG_CD Other: IV - Anticoagulation (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving IV anticoagulations. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
605
